{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary goal of Flow-Oriented Modeling in requirement modeling strategies?",
      "options": ["To identify functional requirements", "To model the sequence of user interactions", "To create a detailed design", "To analyze system performance"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Flow-Oriented Modeling is used to model the sequence of user interactions with the system, helping to identify functional and non-functional requirements."
